name: Emeka Okonkwo
description: A professor at a whiteboard crowded with his own outbreak equations, erasing and rederiving the same curve as though hunting an error he prays he made.
background: Taught epidemiology up at the university and modelled outbreaks that always used to stay on paper.
personality: Clipped, precise, and self-contained — he states the hard number plainly and keeps everything else behind it.
secret: He recognised what the infection was days before the first broadcast and said nothing, praying he was wrong.
notes: T45 · Hillcrest. Skill: medical/epidemiology (infection theme, T49). Hook: he understands the disease better than anyone — and carries the guilt of his silence.
